title: RazorX Fintech raises $15M Series A to expand hiring in India and Southeast Asia
content: Bangalore-based RazorX Fintech has secured $15M in a Series A round led by Sequoia Capital India. The startup plans to double its headcount to over 160 people, particularly hiring for engineering and sales roles. Recently, they appointed Priya Sharma, formerly of Zoho, as their Head of People Operations to manage this hiring blitz.

title: AcmeCorp bags $30M Series B to scale collaborative developer tools
content: AcmeCorp, the developer tooling platform, closed a $30M Series B round. The San Francisco startup will expand its workspace automation tools. HR VP Sarah Jenkins stated they are scaling up operations, though they will continue using hybrid workplace models.

title: ApexData raises $4M Seed round for generative AI research
content: ApexData, a London AI startup, announced a seed round of $4M. The company, founded by Alex Mercer, currently operates with a small team of 45 people tracking their scaling on Excel. They are launching an immediate hiring drive for machine learning researchers and people operations staff.

title: LegacySteel announces 5% workforce reduction amid declining global demand
content: LegacySteel Corp is implementing cost reduction measures including laying off 5% of its workforce over the next six months. The heavy manufacturing conglomerate faces significant headwinds due to reduced steel prices and rising raw material costs.
